title: Add shadow dollar PnL, entry/current price, and TP/SL status to dashboard
objective: Make the dashboard show shadow trades in dollars instead of only units, including entry price, current price, live unrealized PnL, TP/SL target prices, and clear open/resolved status, while keeping shadow mode advisory-only.
inputs: Current paper/default sizing rules if available
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows dollar-based shadow PnL values
Each shadow position shows entry price
Each shadow position shows current live price if available
Each shadow position shows live unrealized PnL in dollars
Each shadow position shows TP target price
Each shadow position shows SL target price
Each shadow position shows status: OPEN, TP_ZONE, SL_ZONE, RESOLVED_WIN, RESOLVED_LOSS, or PENDING
UI clearly labels shadow as advisory-only / not executed
verification: confirm MLB Shadow panel shows entry, current price, live PnL, and TP/SL statuses
